description:
You are the on-duty Senior Dispatcher at the Los Santos Emergency Communications Center. A 911 caller reports an armed carjacking at the intersection of Vinewood Boulevard and Hawick Avenue. Two suspects fled the scene.

Suspect 1 (vehicle): Bystanders identified the driver as one of three known local residents: Marcus Vance, Derek Lawson, or Anton Reeves. The caller states the suspect had an expired driver's license and a prior record for a violent offense. Search NCIC to identify which person matches both criteria — that person is Suspect 1.

Suspect 2 (on foot): Not in the system. Identity established at scene: Ricky Alvarez, DOB 1984-11-09, Male, Hispanic, 842 Jamestown Street Apt 6, Rancho, Los Santos. DL: None.

Document the full incident:
1. Create a 10-31 dispatch call (Crime in Progress) at Vinewood Boulevard / Hawick Avenue. Narrative: armed carjacking, two suspects fled, victim's vehicle stolen.
2. For Suspect 1: issue a warrant for 'Armed Carjacking' (Los Santos Police Department) and a citation for 'Driving with Expired License' ($350 fine).
3. Create a vehicle BOLO for the stolen vehicle: black Ubermacht Oracle, plate VIN-4477.
4. Register Ricky Alvarez as a new civilian with all details above.
5. For Ricky Alvarez: create a person BOLO (Hispanic male, mid-30s, medium build, short black hair, olive cargo jacket, fled eastbound on Hawick Avenue) and issue a warrant for 'Armed Carjacking - Accessory' (Los Santos Police Department).

Access the system at http://localhost using credentials admin@opencad.local / Admin123!.
